title: eleocharis erratica
intro: Eleocharis erratica, also known as dwarf spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis erratica include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis erratica is often used as an infusion or decoction, and can also be combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
